title: check-lifecycle-drift expected output
description: Asserts that /CJ_personal-workflow check correctly identifies gate-row drift inside the Lifecycle section: every Phase header is present but the total checkbox count is below the template minimum. Distinct from check-flags-missing-lifecycle (which removes a whole phase). Schema requires overall=FAIL, lifecycle.status=FAIL, missing_phases=[] (empty), below_minimum=true, checkbox_count < min_checkboxes.

overall.description: Must be FAIL — gate count is below template minimum.

status.description: Must be FAIL — below_minimum is true.

missing_phases.description: Must be empty — every phase header is present in the fixture (this is gate-drift, not phase-drift).

checkbox_count.description: Fixture has 5 lifecycle checkboxes (2 + 1 + 2). Below template minimum (~13).

min_checkboxes.description: Template-derived minimum for tracker-feature.md. Should be the count of `- [ ]` patterns in the template's Lifecycle section (~13).

below_minimum.description: Must be true — fixture's checkbox_count is less than template's min_checkboxes.
